cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the clear career progression and global exposure provided by the company.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Remote work options and supportive management are key drivers of positive work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Comprehensive healthcare and insurance benefits contribute to a sense of stability.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Concerns regarding low salary levels and exhaustion are prevalent among some staff.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel overlooked or underappreciated, citing a lack of salary hikes.
